title: cacalia erythrophila
intro: Cacalia erythrophila, also known as the redstem cacalia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cacalia erythrophila include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
